finding: F1: desktop testid-unique plugin lacked the DefectRepro.tsx TESTID_EXEMPT the web plugin has; since it scans the shared web tree it aborted the gallery build at buildStart on a duplicate testid. Fixed by porting the exemption const + guard (parity). Verified: gallery now boots.

Byte-identical copy of the audited web source (resolves gallery via __dirname → desktop gallery). Verified by the detector-acceptance byte-identity drift guard + guardrail-parity.test.ts. No divergence to review.

Byte-identical copy of audited web source; imports ./lib/gallery-surfaces.mjs which desktop already owns (desktop-scoped surface enumeration). Copy pattern matches desktop's existing gen-state-matrix/gen-crawl-cassette copies.
runLint spawns `node scripts/<lint> --root=<fixture>` with a fixed constant argv (no shell, no interpolation of untrusted input) — no injection surface. cwd pinned to UI_DIR.

runLint treats a NON-ZERO exit as the detector 'firing'. A genuinely MISSING lint script (node cannot find it) also exits non-zero, so it would be miscounted as a pass. Add an explicit existence check so a missing detector fails loudly instead of masquerading as a fired detector.

geometryIdentity compares the local geometry script against ../../ui/scripts source; on a missing web source it returns ok:false (fails loudly) rather than silently passing. Correct fail-closed behavior.

check chain mirrors web ordering and adds the six missing gates; every referenced ../../ui/scripts/*.mjs path is asserted to resolve by guardrail-parity.test.ts, so a renamed web script fails the unit test rather than the build silently.

geometry/affordance/detector/crop are standalone npm scripts (NOT chained into `check`), matching web — so `npm run check` stays browserless/fast; the browser-driven audits run only via gate:ui / the gallery e2e config.

OVERLAY_ENTRIES is empty (no standalone-openable desktop overlay); the single desktop overlay host is allowlisted with an interaction-gating reason. No a11y surface introduced; the manifest shape matches web so a future overlay can be wired open.
Unit tests read the REAL package.json + on-disk scripts (no mocks) and assert byte-identity + gate chaining — a dropped gate or missing script fails them. Meaningful, non-cosmetic.

The affordance-gate test uses --report-only (exit 0 by design) so it is a smoke that the tool runs, not a strong assertion — acceptable because desktop has 0 deep-chat affordance surfaces (nothing to gate). The render/console/axe tests + geometry --gate ARE strong assertions.

workers:1 + reuseExistingServer:true + a dedicated port (1455) avoid contention with the main-checkout gallery (which binds 1420); testMatch scopes to gallery-desktop-*.spec so the real-backend config's global-setup is not triggered (testIgnore added there).
TESTID_EXEMPT is a module-level const regex, no shared mutable state; the fix is a pure filter predicate in findSourceFiles. No lifecycle/ordering concern.
Allowlist only excuses the render-coverage gate; it has no runtime effect. The single host reason documents genuine interaction-gating (composer Popover). No over-broad wildcard.
Committed in-sync with gen-overlay-registry.mjs (check:overlay-registry --check exits 0 + overlay-registry.test.ts asserts it). Regenerated deterministically from source.
